title: VSB STB - Audio, Dolby and Speaker Flow
precondition: STB onboarding is completed. User is logged into the Sjónvarp Símans experience. Internet connection is available. Audio playback content is available. Dolby-supported content is available if Dolby validation is part of the test run. Back speakers are available if speaker pairing is part of the test run.

steps.step: Verify Sjónvarp Símans home experience is displayed
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed
Video playback starts successfully with audio
Audio is heard clearly from the currently selected audio output

steps.data: Press LEFT arrow on remote and navigate to Stillingar
steps.expectedResult: Settings screen opens
Audio settings screen opens
Audio output switches to TV successfully
Playback works and audio is heard through TV output
Audio settings screen opens
Audio output switches to STB successfully
Playback works and audio is heard through STB output
Audio settings screen opens

steps.step: Select Myndlykill og bakhátalarar if supported
steps.expectedResult: Combined STB and back speaker audio output option is selected when supported

steps.step: Verify þráðlausir bakhátalarar option if supported
steps.expectedResult: Wireless back speaker option is visible when supported by the test environment

steps.step: Pair wireless back speakers if available
steps.data: Turn on back speakers and start pairing
steps.expectedResult: Back speakers pair successfully when available

steps.step: Start or resume playback with back speakers if paired
steps.expectedResult: Playback works and audio is heard from the expected speakers
Device settings screen opens

steps.step: Toggle Dolby ef mögulegt if supported
steps.expectedResult: Dolby setting updates successfully when supported
Dolby-supported content starts successfully and audio output follows the expected Dolby configuration for the test environment

steps.step: Toggle Dolby ef mögulegt back to original value if changed
steps.expectedResult: Dolby setting is restored to original value

steps.data: Use configured restart option for the test environment
steps.expectedResult: STB restarts successfully
Sjónvarp Símans home screen or expected startup screen is displayed
Configured audio settings persist or return to expected default

steps.step: Verify back speakers after reboot if paired
steps.expectedResult: Back speakers reconnect automatically or are available for reconnection
Playback starts successfully and audio works
